title: Arte della Seta Lisio Foundation | LinkedIn
highlights: Heir to the manufactory founded by Giuseppe Lisio in Florence in 1906: the primary objective is to keep alive and hand down the art of hand-weaving in silk, gold and silver. To this end, the foundation conducts actual production as well as teaching and cultural activities.
